raw_input: [auto-generated from playbook] Scale the successful patient interaction angle with new creative emphasizing mission over efficiency
value_proposition: Scale the successful patient interaction angle with new creative emphasizing mission over efficiency
pain_point: Being chained to your desk doing documentation instead of focusing on helping patients
tone_direction: Aspirational but grounded. Mission-driven but practical. Empathetic.
visual_direction: Photography focused on genuine clinician-patient interaction moments—active listening, empathetic gestures, connection. Not therapy session staging but the feeling of real therapeutic alliance. Could be mixed media showing patient interaction followed by quick/easy note completion, emphasizing the contrast between complex human care and simple documentation. Warm earth tones, natural lighting, close-up shots that feel intimate without being invasive. Show diverse patient populations and clinician types. Avoid anything that looks like stock healthcare photography—go for documentary-style authenticity. Optional: Include brief UI screen showing how quickly the note gets done, but keep focus on the human moment.
key_phrases: Spend more time healing. Less time typing.
You became a clinician to help people, not to fight with documentation
Better documentation. Better care. Better you.
